title: WHO determines Bundibugyo virus disease outbreak in DRC and Uganda is a PHEIC
summary: WHO reported the initial confirmation of Bundibugyo virus disease in DRC and imported cases in Uganda, with response measures underway.

title: WHO reports rapid increase and geographic expansion in DRC
summary: WHO reported increased suspected and confirmed counts in DRC, confirmed imported cases in Uganda, and ongoing response constraints.

title: IHR Emergency Committee issues temporary recommendations
summary: WHO issued temporary recommendations for affected and at-risk States Parties after the first IHR Emergency Committee meeting.
notes: Context only; no count rows extracted.

title: CDC mobilizes international response support
summary: CDC described support for surveillance, diagnostics, infection prevention and control, and outbreak containment activities in DRC and Uganda.
